text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
195 
OUTLIER_DAYS 
LABEL: 
Outlier Days Count 
DESCRIPTION: This field specifies the number of days paid as outliers under Prospective Payment System (PPS) and 
the days over the threshold for the DRG. 
SHORT NAME: OUTLIER_DAYS 
LONG NAME: OUTLIER_DAYS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
VALUES: 
0–XXXXXX; may be negative
